# NBRS

> NBRS (pronounced "neighbours") is a Toronto-based developer building quality rental housing at the neighbourhood scale. We focus on missing middle housing — 5-10 unit buildings in established neighbourhoods designed for families.

## About

NBRS Developments Inc. was founded in 2023 to address Toronto's missing middle housing gap. We build smaller, distributed projects that integrate seamlessly into existing streetscapes. Our tech-enabled approach delivers new housing in 12-18 months from acquisition by targeting as-of-right sites that don't require rezoning.

- Website: https://nbrs.ca
- Email: hello@nbrs.ca
- Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada

## Current Project: FAMILY 1

Our first development — five family-sized rental units in a vibrant Toronto neighbourhood.

- 1,300 sq ft per unit
- 3 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms
- Dedicated outdoor space
- Currently under construction
- First move-ins expected Fall 2026
- Waitlist open: https://nbrs.ca/waitlist

## How We Build

1. Buy as-of-right land in established Toronto neighbourhoods — no rezoning required
2. Design 5-10 unit buildings that fit naturally into the streetscape
3. Build quality homes with real bedrooms, real storage, real space
4. Deliver new housing in 12-18 months from acquisition
5. Rent directly to families who want to stay in the city they love

## Partnership Opportunities

We work with accredited investors, landowners with underutilized parcels, brokers with off-market or as-of-right sites, and nonprofits looking to expand community housing.

- Partner page: https://nbrs.ca/partner
